description: Adam and Sylvie discuss their experience at Breakpoint 2023, focusing on the use of Solana Pay and Solightning for seamless payments and cross-chain swaps between Bitcoin and Solana. They demonstrate a successful payment at Melly's Cookie Bar using Solana Pay and explain the mechanics of Solightning, emphasizing its trustless nature and efficiency.
topic_summary: At Breakpoint 2023, Adam and Sylvie showcase Solightning, a trustless cross-chain DEX for Bitcoin and Solana, highlighting its use for payments and swaps. They provide a live demo of using Solana Pay at a cafe and explain the technical aspects of the platform.
